scenarios.title: Dog hears footsteps near the door

pet.name: Mochi
pet.owner_notes: Mochi barks when delivery workers approach the apartment door.

recent_history: A delivery arrived yesterday at the same time.
Mochi received a treat after alerting the owner.

scenarios.title: Cat complains near the food bowl

pet.name: Luna
pet.owner_notes: Luna meows sharply when the bowl is empty.

recent_history: Breakfast was delayed by ten minutes.
The bowl was empty in the last check-in.

scenarios.title: Cat purrs during sofa time

pet.name: Bean
pet.owner_notes: Bean purrs when brushed behind the ears.

recent_history: The owner brushed Bean for three minutes.
Bean leaned toward the brush instead of walking away.

scenarios.title: Dog waits outside the vet room

pet.name: Nova
pet.owner_notes: Nova whines softly in stressful new locations.

recent_history: Nova saw another dog enter the exam room.
The owner has been sitting quietly for five minutes.
